title: aphelandra scabra
intro: Aphelandra scabra, also known as the zebra plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antimalarial, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Aphelandra scabra include treating fever, wounds, and respiratory issues, making it a valuable asset in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Aphelandra scabra can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which is then used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
